    startDate,\n   110→          meetingFormat,\n   111→          size,\n   112→          requiresApproval ? 1 : 0,\n   113→          platform\n   114→        );\n   115→\n   116→      // Auto-join the author as a member\n   117→      db.prepare(\n   118→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n   119→      ).run(result.lastInsertRowid, session.userId);\n   120→\n   121→      return result.lastInsertRowid;\n   122→    });\n   123→\n   124→    const listingId = createTransaction();\n   125→\n   126→    return NextResponse.json(\n   127→      { id: listingId },\n   128→      { status: 201 }\n   129→    );\n   130→  } catch (error) {\n   131→    console.error(\"Create listing error:\", error);\n   132→    return NextResponse.json(\n   133→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   134→      { status: 500 }\n   135→    );\n   136→  }\n   137→}\n   138→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"6eb7e153-f8ce-4ec7-810f-30cbbc2724d6","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:08.515Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a8e6194c4a49f53e1","tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","description":"Reading app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":20502,"tool_uses":8,"duration_ms":14315},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"91654b39-777e-4ac9-902f-3d4023715e87","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01Ga9mWTaTVsdpcWe8dJyvb6","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01XEfskJBBefXBYPqBnzZH1D","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7248,"cache_read_input_tokens":12975,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":7248,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"9805bf8d-410b-4a38-afad-36b2e5d5e2c6"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01XEfskJBBefXBYPqBnzZH1D","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function PATCH(\n     7→  req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const body = await req.json();\n    34→  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n    35→\n    36→  if (!applicationId || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n    44→  const application = db\n    45→    .prepare(\n    46→      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    47→    )\n    48→    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    49→\n    50→  if (!application) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n    53→      { status: 404 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n    58→\n    59→  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    60→    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    61→    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    62→      // Check if group is already full\n    63→      const { count } = db\n    64→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    65→        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    66→\n    67→      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    68→        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n    69→      }\n    70→\n    71→      // Update application status\n    72→      db.prepare(\n    73→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    74→      ).run(applicationId);\n    75→\n    76→      // Add to members\n    77→      db.prepare(\n    78→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    79→      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n    80→\n    81→      // Check if group is now full\n    82→      const newCount = count + 1;\n    83→      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n    84→      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    85→        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    86→\n    87→        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n    88→        rejectedApps = db\n    89→          .prepare(\n    90→            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    91→          )\n    92→          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n    93→\n    94→        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n    95→          db.prepare(\n    96→            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    97→          ).run(app.id);\n    98→        }\n    99→\n   100→        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n   101→      }\n   102→      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n   103→    });\n   104→\n   105→    try {\n   106→      const result = approveTransaction();\n   107→\n   108→      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n   109→      try {\n   110→        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n   111→\n   112→        if (result.isFull) {\n   113→          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n   114→          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n   115→            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   116→          }\n   117→        }\n   118→      } catch (notifErr) {\n   119→        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n   120→      }\n   121→\n   122→      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   123→    } catch (err) {\n   124→      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n   125→      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n   126→    }\n   127→  } else {\n   128→    // Reject\n   129→    db.prepare(\n   130→      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   131→    ).run(applicationId);\n   132→\n   133→    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   134→\n   135→    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   136→  }\n   137→}\n   138→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"5106f34c-e1ea-4dd9-8d23-6c587c0510af","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:11.643Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a8e6194c4a49f53e1","tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","description":"Reading app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":20538,"tool_uses":9,"duration_ms":14782},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"3d2db53d-4958-4587-9acb-c83ca39d2dab","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01Ga9mWTaTVsdpcWe8dJyvb6","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01BjfKg3stDuwiW4M5ASqiV4","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7248,"cache_read_input_tokens":12975,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":7248,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"0526deab-dd96-4709-84ef-929c86d9ffbd"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01BjfKg3stDuwiW4M5ASqiV4","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationReceived } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"You cannot apply to your own listing\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (!listing.requires_approval) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"This group does not require approval. Join directly.\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  if (listing.is_full) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    45→  }\n    46→\n    47→  // Wrap membership check + application in a transaction to prevent TOCTOU races\n    48→  const applyTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    49→    // Check if already a member\n    50→    const isMember = db\n    51→      .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n    52→      .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    53→\n    54→    if (isMember) {\n    55→      return { error: \"You are already a member\", status: 400 };\n    56→    }\n    57→\n    58→    // Re-check is_full inside transaction\n    59→    const currentListing = db\n    60→      .prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    61→      .get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n    62→\n    63→    if (currentListing?.is_full) {\n    64→      return { error: \"This group is already full\", status: 400 };\n    65→    }\n    66→\n    67→    // Check if already applied (pending)\n    68→    const existingApp = db\n    69→      .prepare(\n    70→        \"SELECT id, status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    71→      )\n    72→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { id: number; status: string } | undefined;\n    73→\n    74→    if (existingApp) {\n    75→      if (existingApp.status === \"pending\") {\n    76→        return { error: \"You have already applied\", status: 400 };\n    77→      }\n    78→      if (existingApp.status === \"approved\") {\n    79→        return { error: \"You are already approved\", status: 400 };\n    80→      }\n    81→      // If rejected, allow re-application by updating status back to pending\n    82→      db.prepare(\n    83→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'pending', decided_at = NULL, applied_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    84→      ).run(existingApp.id);\n    85→\n    86→      return { error: null, status: 200 };\n    87→    }\n    88→\n    89→    // Insert new application\n    90→    db.prepare(\n    91→      \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    92→    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n    93→\n    94→    return { error: null, status: 200 };\n    95→  });\n    96→\n    97→  const result = applyTransaction();\n    98→\n    99→  if (result.error) {\n   100→    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: result.status });\n   101→  }\n   102→\n   103→  // Notify outside transaction (fire-and-forget)\n   104→  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n   105→\n   106→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   107→}\n   108→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"4c74e1f3-a5d0-496d-9bd2-38425bf03de1","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:12.105Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a8e6194c4a49f53e1","tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","description":"Reading app/api/auth/register/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":20574,"tool_uses":10,"duration_ms":15041},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"ee001d9f-e2ae-4d31-8a64-deb74f06b60a","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01Ga9mWTaTVsdpcWe8dJyvb6","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01DyGnybKsnFHeFcsUrD7ujZ","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/register/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7248,"cache_read_input_tokens":12975,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":7248,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"0b340f4d-e2e8-4229-85d5-845d84dd93b8"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01DyGnybKsnFHeFcsUrD7ujZ","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 3 registrations per IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(`register:${ip}`, 3);\n    21→    if (!allowed) {\n    22→      return NextResponse.json(\n    23→        { error: \"Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    24→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    25→      );\n    26→    }\n    27→\n    28→    if (password.length < 8) {\n    29→      return NextResponse.json(\n    30→        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n    31→        { status: 400 }\n    32→      );\n    33→    }\n    34→\n    35→    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    36→    if (password.length > 72) {\n    37→      return NextResponse.json(\n    38→        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n    39→        { status: 400 }\n    40→      );\n    41→    }\n    42→\n    43→    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n    46→        { status: 400 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    if (email.length > 254) {\n    51→      return NextResponse.json(\n    52→        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n    53→        { status: 400 }\n    54→      );\n    55→    }\n    56→\n    57→    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email.trim())) {\n    58→      return NextResponse.json(\n    59→        { error: \"Please provide a valid email address\" },\n    60→        { status: 400 }\n    61→      );\n    62→    }\n    63→\n    64→    // Check if email is already taken\n    65→    const existing = db\n    66→      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    67→      .get(email);\n    68→    if (existing) {\n    69→      return NextResponse.json(\n    70→        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n    71→        { status: 409 }\n    72→      );\n    73→    }\n    74→\n    75→    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n    76→\n    77→    const result = db\n    78→      .prepare(\n    79→        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n    80→      )\n    81→      .run(email.toLowerCase().trim(), passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n    82→\n    83→    // Auto-login after registration\n    84→    const session = await getSession();\n    85→    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    86→    session.email = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    87→    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    88→    await session.save();\n    89→\n    90→    return NextResponse.json(\n    91→      {\n    92→        user: {\n    93→          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n    94→          email: email.toLowerCase().trim(),\n    95→          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n    96→        },\n    97→      },\n    98→      { status: 201 }\n    99→    );\n   100→  } catch (error) {\n   101→    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n   102→    return NextResponse.json(\n   103→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   104→      { status: 500 }\n   105→    );\n   106→  }\n   107→}\n   108→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"8a350553-0eb0-4838-8243-a244aed6032d","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:12.363Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"a8e6194c4a49f53e1","tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","description":"Reading app/api/auth/login/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":25346,"tool_uses":11,"duration_ms":18229},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"41ce360f-8783-4c4e-8a06-22315b8d28f1","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01UJdTBAkSHbhLdTMMjGNgVo","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01F1kPbQKhxYVwhuF4V1rkxp","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/login/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4735,"cache_read_input_tokens":20223,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4735,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":37,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"115b46ba-c663-4308-8eba-d26311d64f0e"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01F1kPbQKhxYVwhuF4V1rkxp","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email and password are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 5 login attempts per email+IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const rateLimitKey = `login:${ip}:${email.toLowerCase().trim()}`;\n    21→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 5);\n    22→    if (!allowed) {\n    23→      return NextResponse.json(\n    24→        { error: \"Too many login attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    25→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    26→      );\n    27→    }\n    28→\n    29→    const user = db\n    30→      .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    31→      .get(email.toLowerCase().trim()) as\n    32→      | { id: number; email: string; password_hash: string; display_name: string }\n    33→      | undefined;\n    34→\n    35→    if (!user) {\n    36→      return NextResponse.json(\n    37→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    38→        { status: 401 }\n    39→      );\n    40→    }\n    41→\n    42→    const valid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);\n    43→    if (!valid) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    46→        { status: 401 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    const session = await getSession();\n    51→    session.userId = user.id;\n    52→    session.email = user.email;\n    53→    session.displayName = user.display_name;\n    54→    await session.save();\n    55→\n    56→    return NextResponse.json({\n    57→      user: {\n    58→        id: user.id,\n    59→        email: user.email,\n    60→        displayName: user.display_name,\n    61→      },\n    62→    });\n    63→  } catch (error) {\n    64→    console.error(\"Login error:\", error);\n    65→    return NextResponse.json(\n    66→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    67→      { status: 500 }\n    68→    );\n    69→  }\n    70→}\n    71→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"ce5a1c55-61d0-458e-9c11-1e45c38c0435","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:15.556Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01EVvFpt3dkpr7iHezp7ZvDM","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Rules:\n    12→ * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n    13→ * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n    14→ * - Cannot rate yourself\n    15→ * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n    16→ */\n    17→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    18→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    19→  if (!session) {\n    20→    return NextResponse.json(\n    21→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    22→      { status: 401 }\n    23→    );\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const body = await req.json();\n    27→  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n    28→\n    29→  if (listingId == null || ratedUserId == null || score == null) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  // Validate listingId and ratedUserId are positive integers\n    37→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    38→    return NextResponse.json(\n    39→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    40→      { status: 400 }\n    41→    );\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  if (typeof ratedUserId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(ratedUserId) || ratedUserId < 1) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Invalid ratedUserId\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n    54→      { status: 400 }\n    55→    );\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    59→    return NextResponse.json(\n    60→      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n    61→      { status: 400 }\n    62→    );\n    63→  }\n    64→\n    65→  if (comment && comment.length > 1000) {\n    66→    return NextResponse.json(\n    67→      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n    68→      { status: 400 }\n    69→    );\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  // Verify listing exists and is full\n    73→  const listing = db\n    74→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    75→    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n    76→\n    77→  if (!listing) {\n    78→    return NextResponse.json(\n    79→      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n    80→      { status: 404 }\n    81→    );\n    82→  }\n    83→\n    84→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    85→    return NextResponse.json(\n    86→      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n    87→      { status: 400 }\n    88→    );\n    89→  }\n    90→\n    91→  // Verify both users are members\n    92→  const raterMember = db\n    93→    .prepare(\n    94→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    95→    )\n    96→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    97→\n    98→  if (!raterMember) {\n    99→    return NextResponse.json(\n   100→      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n   101→      { status: 403 }\n   102→    );\n   103→  }\n   104→\n   105→  const ratedMember = db\n   106→    .prepare(\n   107→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n   108→    )\n   109→    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n   110→\n   111→  if (!ratedMember) {\n   112→    return NextResponse.json(\n   113→      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n   114→      { status: 400 }\n   115→    );\n   116→  }\n   117→\n   118→  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n   119→  const existing = db\n   120→    .prepare(\n   121→      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n   122→    )\n   123→    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n   124→\n   125→  if (existing) {\n   126→    db.prepare(\n   127→      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   128→    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n   129→  } else {\n   130→    db.prepare(\n   131→      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n   132→    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n   133→\n   134→    // Notify the rated user\n   135→    createNotification(\n   136→      ratedUserId,\n   137→      listingId,\n   138→      \"rating_received\",\n   139→      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n   140→    );\n   141→  }\n   142→\n   143→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   144→}\n   145→\n   146→/**\n   147→ * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n   148→ *\n   149→ * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n   150→ * plus the members who can still be rated.\n   151→ */\n   152→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n   153→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   154→  if (!session) {\n   155→    return NextResponse.json(\n   156→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n   157→      { status: 401 }\n   158→    );\n   159→  }\n   160→\n   161→  const listingIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n   162→  if (!listingIdParam) {\n   163→    return NextResponse.json(\n   164→      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n   165→      { status: 400 }\n   166→    );\n   167→  }\n   168→  const listingId = parseInt(listingIdParam, 10);\n   169→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   170→    return NextResponse.json(\n   171→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n   172→      { status: 400 }\n   173→    );\n   174→  }\n   175→\n   176→  // Verify the current user is a member of this listing\n   177→  const isMember = db\n   178→    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n   179→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   180→  if (!isMember) {\n   181→    return NextResponse.json(\n   182→      { error: \"You are not a member of this group\" },\n   183→      { status: 403 }\n   184→    );\n   185→  }\n   186→\n   187→  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n   188→  const givenRatings = db\n   189→    .prepare(\n   190→      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   191→       FROM ratings r\n   192→       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n   193→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n   194→    )\n   195→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   196→      rated_user_id: number;\n   197→      score: number;\n   198→      comment: string;\n   199→      display_name: string;\n   200→    }[];\n   201→\n   202→  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n   203→  const receivedRatings = db\n   204→    .prepare(\n   205→      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   206→       FROM ratings r\n   207→       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n   208→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n   209→    )\n   210→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   211→      rater_id: number;\n   212→      score: number;\n   213→      comment: string;\n   214→      display_name: string;\n   215→    }[];\n   216→\n   217→  return NextResponse.json({\n   218→    givenRatings,\n   219→    receivedRatings,\n   220→  });\n   221→}\n   222→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"1356a188-4db8-4258-bfb6-52f3c868e4c9","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:15.936Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_012SSHArEE18ETmkKXbbjG1M","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const notifications = db\n    12→    .prepare(\n    13→      `SELECT n.*, l.book_title\n    14→       FROM notifications n\n    15→       LEFT JOIN listings l ON n.listing_id = l.id\n    16→       WHERE n.user_id = ?\n    17→       ORDER BY n.created_at DESC\n    18→       LIMIT 50`\n    19→    )\n    20→    .all(session.userId);\n    21→\n    22→  const unreadCount = db\n    23→    .prepare(\n    24→      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\"\n    25→    )\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    notifications,\n    30→    unreadCount: unreadCount.count,\n    31→  });\n    32→}\n    33→\n    34→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n    35→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    36→  if (!session) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  const { notificationId } = await req.json();\n    41→\n    42→  if (notificationId) {\n    43→    // Validate notificationId is a positive integer\n    44→    if (typeof notificationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(notificationId) || notificationId < 1) {\n    45→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid notification ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    46→    }\n    47→    db.prepare(\n    48→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    49→    ).run(notificationId, session.userId);\n    50→  } else {\n    51→    // Mark all as read\n    52→    db.prepare(\n    53→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = ?\"\n    54→    ).run(session.userId);\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    58→}\n    59→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"6fca61cc-9ea2-4a79-b375-a08e144d2765","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:16.029Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01DHEKPx5YBviuoZT4SXRXAp","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n    12→\n    13→  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n    15→  }\n    16→\n    17→  if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    26→    displayName.trim(),\n    27→    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    28→    session.userId\n    29→  );\n    30→\n    31→  // Update session\n    32→  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    33→  await session.save();\n    34→\n    35→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    36→}\n    37→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"68633149-c4fd-4801-a8a0-b728c6d7767e","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:19.216Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01P6pDM1Y3UR5FBNvpR67DG9","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n     9→ * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n    10→ */\n    11→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n    12→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    13→  if (!session) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json(\n    15→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    16→      { status: 401 }\n    17→    );\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");\n    21→  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;\n    22→  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;\n    23→\n    24→  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json(\n    26→      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },\n    27→      { status: 400 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  // Average score\n    32→  const stats = db\n    33→    .prepare(\n    34→      `SELECT\n    35→        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n    36→        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n    37→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n    38→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n    39→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n    40→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n    41→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n    42→       FROM ratings\n    43→       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    44→    )\n    45→    .get(userId) as {\n    46→      total_ratings: number;\n    47→      average_score: number | null;\n    48→      five_star: number;\n    49→      four_star: number;\n    50→      three_star: number;\n    51→      two_star: number;\n    52→      one_star: number;\n    53→    };\n    54→\n    55→  // Number of completed groups\n    56→  const completedGroups = db\n    57→    .prepare(\n    58→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n    59→       FROM listing_members lm\n    60→       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n    61→       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    62→    )\n    63→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    64→\n    65→  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n    66→  const groupsRated = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n    69→       FROM ratings\n    70→       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    71→    )\n    72→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    73→\n    74→  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n    75→  const recentRatings = db\n    76→    .prepare(\n    77→      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n    78→       FROM ratings r\n    79→       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n    80→       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n    81→       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n    82→       LIMIT 10`\n    83→    )\n    84→    .all(userId) as {\n    85→      score: number;\n    86→      comment: string;\n    87→      created_at: string;\n    88→      book_title: string;\n    89→    }[];\n    90→\n    91→  // Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles (privacy)\n    92→  const sanitizedRatings = isOwnProfile\n    93→    ? recentRatings\n    94→    : recentRatings.map(({ score, created_at, book_title }) => ({\n    95→        score,\n    96→        created_at,\n    97→        book_title,\n    98→      }));\n    99→\n   100→  return NextResponse.json({\n   101→    reputation: {\n   102→      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n   103→      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n   104→      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n   105→      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n   106→      breakdown: {\n   107→        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n   108→        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n   109→        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n   110→        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n   111→        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n   112→      },\n   113→      recentRatings: sanitizedRatings,\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"08f9cb25-a2b9-41d0-a8c3-6efecd2ca689","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:19.719Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01MxkFZwz1vZeev8bNXwPET2","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import db from \"./db\";\n     2→import { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\n     3→\n     4→function getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n     5→  const user = db\n     6→    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n     7→    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n     8→  return user?.email || null;\n     9→}\n    10→\n    11→export function createNotification(\n    12→  userId: number,\n    13→  listingId: number | null,\n    14→  type: string,\n    15→  message: string\n    16→) {\n    17→  db.prepare(\n    18→    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    19→  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n    20→\n    21→  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n    22→  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n    23→  if (email) {\n    24→    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    25→    sendEmail(email, subject, message).catch(() => {\n    26→      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    27→    });\n    28→  }\n    29→}\n    30→\n    31→function getEmailSubject(type: string): string {\n    32→  switch (type) {\n    33→    case \"new_member\":\n    34→      return \"Bookmate: Someone joined your reading group!\";\n    35→    case \"group_full\":\n    36→      return \"Bookmate: Your reading group is full!\";\n    37→    case \"application_received\":\n    38→      return \"Bookmate: New application for your reading group\";\n    39→    case \"application_approved\":\n    40→      return \"Bookmate: Your application was approved!\";\n    41→    case \"application_rejected\":\n    42→      return \"Bookmate: Application update\";\n    43→    case \"rating_received\":\n    44→      return \"Bookmate: You received a new rating\";\n    45→    case \"listing_deleted\":\n    46→      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been cancelled\";\n    47→    case \"listing_updated\":\n    48→      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    49→    default:\n    50→      return \"Bookmate: Notification\";\n    51→  }\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→export function notifyListingAuthor(\n    55→  listingId: number,\n    56→  joinerName: string\n    57→) {\n    58→  const listing = db\n    59→    .prepare(\n    60→      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    61→    )\n    62→    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n    63→\n    64→  if (listing) {\n    65→    createNotification(\n    66→      listing.author_id,\n    67→      listingId,\n    68→      \"new_member\",\n    69→      `${joinerName} joined your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    70→    );\n    71→  }\n    72→}\n    73→\n    74→export function notifyApplicationReceived(\n    75→  listingId: number,\n    76→  applicantName: string\n    77→) {\n    78→  const listing = db\n    79→    .prepare(\n    80→      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    81→    )\n    82→    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n    83→\n    84→  if (listing) {\n    85→    createNotification(\n    86→      listing.author_id,\n    87→      listingId,\n    88→      \"application_received\",\n    89→      `${applicantName} applied to join your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    90→    );\n    91→  }\n    92→}\n    93→\n    94→export function notifyApplicationDecision(\n    95→  userId: number,\n    96→  listingId: number,\n    97→  decision: \"approved\" | \"rejected\"\n    98→) {\n    99→  const listing = db\n   100→    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   101→    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;\n   102→\n   103→  if (listing) {\n   104→    const type = decision === \"approved\" ? \"application_approved\" : \"application_rejected\";\n   105→    const message =\n   106→      decision === \"approved\"\n   107→        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n   108→        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n   109→    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n   110→  }\n   111→}\n   112→\n   113→export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n   114→  const listing = db\n   115→    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   116→    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string } | undefined;\n   117→  const members = db\n   118→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   119→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   120→\n   121→  if (listing) {\n   122→    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n   123→    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n   124→      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n   125→      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n   126→    const message = botConfigured\n   127→      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n   128→      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n   129→\n   130→    for (const member of members) {\n   131→      createNotification(\n   132→        member.user_id,\n   133→        listingId,\n   134→        \"group_full\",\n   135→        message\n   136→      );\n   137→    }\n   138→  }\n   139→}\n   140→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"31d6c96c-0a3e-4441-8cee-e27cfd4b1e39","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:19.896Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017aoz4Jg7NsWJJB4vopu32V","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→\n     4→const PAGE_SIZE = 20;\n     5→\n     6→export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n     7→  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n     8→\n     9→  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n    10→  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n    11→  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n    12→  const startDateFrom = searchParams.get(\"start_date_from\") || \"\";\n    13→  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n    14→  const includePast = searchParams.get(\"include_past\") === \"true\";\n    15→  const pageParam = parseInt(searchParams.get(\"page\") || \"1\", 10);\n    16→  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : Math.min(pageParam, 1000);\n    17→\n    18→  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n    19→  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n    20→\n    21→  // By default, hide listings with start dates in the past\n    22→  if (!includePast) {\n    23→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    24→    params.push(new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0]);\n    25→  }\n    26→\n    27→  if (q && q.length <= 300) {\n    28→    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");\n    29→    params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  if (meetingFormat && [\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    33→    conditions.push(\"l.meeting_format = ?\");\n    34→    params.push(meetingFormat);\n    35→  }\n    36→\n    37→  if (readingPace && readingPace.length <= 200) {\n    38→    conditions.push(\"l.reading_pace LIKE ?\");\n    39→    params.push(`%${readingPace}%`);\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  if (startDateFrom && /^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDateFrom)) {\n    43→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    44→    params.push(startDateFrom);\n    45→  }\n    46→\n    47→  const whereClause = conditions.join(\" AND \");\n    48→\n    49→  let orderClause = \"l.created_at DESC\";\n    50→  if (sort === \"oldest\") orderClause = \"l.created_at ASC\";\n    51→  else if (sort === \"start_date\") orderClause = \"l.start_date ASC\";\n    52→\n    53→  const offset = (page - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n    54→\n    55→  // Get total count for pagination metadata\n    56→  const countResult = db\n    57→    .prepare(\n    58→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM listings l WHERE ${whereClause}`\n    59→    )\n    60→    .get(...params) as { total: number };\n    61→\n    62→  const listings = db\n    63→    .prepare(\n    64→      `SELECT\n    65→        l.*,\n    66→        u.display_name as author_name,\n    67→        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    68→      FROM listings l\n    69→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    70→      WHERE ${whereClause}\n    71→      ORDER BY ${orderClause}\n    72→      LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    73→    )\n    74→    .all(...params, PAGE_SIZE, offset);\n    75→\n    76→  return NextResponse.json({\n    77→    listings,\n    78→    pagination: {\n    79→      page,\n    80→      pageSize: PAGE_SIZE,\n    81→      total: countResult.total,\n    82→      totalPages: Math.ceil(countResult.total / PAGE_SIZE),\n    83→    },\n    84→  });\n    85→}\n    86→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"0e89daca-d475-40f1-b71a-d067fea33fa4","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:24.332Z"}

`\\u2713 ${genre}` : genre}\n   569→                    </button>\n   570→                  );\n   571→                })}\n   572→              </div>\n   573→\n   574→              {userGenres.length > 0 && (\n   575→                <p\n   576→                  className=\"text-sm\"\n   577→                  style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   578→                >\n   579→                  {userGenres.length} genre{userGenres.length !== 1 ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save genres\"}\n   603→              </button>\n   604→            </>\n   605→          )}\n   606→        </div>\n   607→      )}\n   608→    </div>\n   609→  );\n   610→}\n   611→\n   612→/* Reading Section Component */\n   613→function ReadingSection({\n   614→  title,\n   615→  items,\n   616→  emptyText,\n   617→  formatDate,\n   618→  variant,\n   619→}: {\n   620→  title: string;\n   621→  items: ReadingItem[];\n   622→  emptyText: string;\n   623→  formatDate: (s: string) => string;\n   624→  variant: \"active\" | \"upcoming\" | \"history\";\n   625→}) {\n   626→  if (items.length === 0 && variant !== \"active\") return null;\n   627→\n   628→  const badgeColors = {\n   629→    active: { bg: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\", color: \"var(--color-success)\" },\n   630→    upcoming: { bg: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\", color: \"var(--color-accent)\" },\n   631→    history: { bg: \"rgba(107, 107, 107, 0.1)\", color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" },\n   632→  };\n   633→\n   634→  return (\n   635→    <div>\n   636→      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-3\">\n   637→        <h2 className=\"text-lg\">{title}</h2>\n   638→        <span\n   639→          className=\"badge\"\n   640→          style={{\n   641→            backgroundColor: badgeColors[variant].bg,\n   642→            color: badgeColors[variant].color,\n   643→          }}\n   644→        >\n   645→          {items.length}\n   646→        </span>\n   647→      </div>\n   648→\n   649→      {items.length === 0 ? (\n   650→        <div className=\"card\">\n   651→          <p\n   652→            className=\"text-sm text-center py-4\"\n   653→            style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   654→          >\n   655→            {emptyText}\n   656→          </p>\n   657→        </div>\n   658→      ) : (\n   659→        <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n   660→          {items.map((item) => (\n   661→            <Link\n   662→              key={item.id}\n   663→              href={`/listings/${item.id}`}\n   664→              className=\"card flex gap-4 items-start hover:shadow-md transition-shadow\"\n   665→              style={{ display: \"flex\", textDecoration: \"none\", color: \"inherit\" }}\n   666→            >\n   667→              {/* Book Cover */}\n   668→              <BookCover\n   669→                src={item.book_cover_url}\n   670→                alt={item.book_title}\n   671→                width={48}\n   672→                height={72}\n   673→                className=\"object-cover rounded\"\n   674→                style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n   675→              />\n   676→\n   677→      style={{\n   682→                    overflow: \"hidden\",\n   683→                    textOverflow: \"ellipsis\",\n   684→                    whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n   685→ Please try again.\");\n   125→      setShowDeleteConfirm(false);\n   126→    } finally {\n   127→      setDeleting(false);\n   128→    }\n   129→  };\n   130→\n   131→  const fetchRatings = useCallback(async () => {\n   132→    if (!id) return;\n   133→    try {\n   134→      const res = await fetch(`/api/ratings?listingId=${id}`);\n   135→      const data = await res.json();\n   136→      if (data.givenRatings) {\n   137→        const given: Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }> = {};\n   138→        const scores: Record<number, number> = {};\n   139→        const comments: Record<number, string> = {};\n   140→        for (const r of data.givenRatings) {\n   141→          given[r.rated_user_id] = { score: r.score, comment: r.comment };\n   142→          scores[r.rated_user_id] = r.score;\n   143→          comments[r.rated_user_id] = r.comment;\n   144→        }\n   145→        setGivenRatings(given);\n   146→        setRatingScores(scores);\n   147→        setRatingComments(comments);\n   148→      }\n   149→    } catch {\n   150→      // Silently fail — ratings are not critical\n   151→    }\n   152→  }, [id]);\n   153→\n   154→  useEffect(() => {\n   155→    if (listing?.is_full && listing?.isMember) {\n   156→      fetchRatings();\n   157→    }\n   158→  }, [listing?.is_full, listing?.isMember, fetchRatings]);\n   159→\n   160→  const handleRatingSubmit = async (memberId: number) => {\n   161→    const score = ratingScores[memberId];\n   162→    if (!score) return;\n   163→    setRatingSaving(memberId);\n   164→    setRatingMessage(\"\");\n   165→    try {\n   166→      const res = await fetch(\"/api/ratings\", {\n   167→        method: \"POST\",\n   168→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   169→        body: JSON.stringify({\n   170→          listingId: parseInt(id as string, 10),\n   171→          ratedUserId: memberId,\n   172→          score,\n   173→          comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\",\n   174→        }),\n   175→      });\n   176→      const data = await res.json();\n   177→      if (!res.ok) {\n   178→        setRatingMessage(data.error || \"Failed to submit rating\");\n   179→      } else {\n   180→        setRatingMessage(\"Rating saved!\");\n   181→        setGivenRatings((prev) => ({\n   182→          ...prev,\n   183→          [memberId]: { score, comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\" },\n   184→        }));\n   185→      }\n   186→    } catch {\n   187→      setRatingMessage(\"Failed to submit rating\");\n   188→    } finally {\n   189→      setRatingSaving(null);\n   190→    }\n   191→  };\n   192→\n   193→  const handleJoin = async () => {\n   194→    setJoining(true);\n   195→    setError(\"\");\n   196→    try {\n   197→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n   198→      const data = await res.json();\n   199→      if (!res.ok) {\n   200→        if (res.status === 401) {\n   201→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n   202→          return;\n   203→        }\n   204→        setError(data.error);\n   205→        return;\n   206→      }\n   207→      await fetchListing();\n   208→    } catch {\n   209→      setError(\"Failed to join. Please try again.\");\n   210→    } finally {\n   211→      setJoining(false);\n   212→    }\n   213→  };\n   214→\n   215→  const handleApply = async () => {\n   216→    setApplying(true);\n   217→    setError(\"\");\n   218→    try {\n   219→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/apply`, { method: \"POST\" });\n   220→      const data = await res.json();\n   221→      if (!res.ok) {\n   222→        if (res.status === 401) {\n   223→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n   224→          return;\n   225→        }\n   226→        setError(data.error);\n   227→        return;\n   228→      }\n   229→      await fetchListing();\n   230→    } catch {\n   231→      setError(\"Failed to apply. Please try again.\");\n   232→    } finally {\n   233→      setApplying(false);\n   234→    }\n   235→  };\n   236→\n   237→  const handleDecision = async (applicationId: number, action: \"approve\" | \"reject\") => {\n   238→    setDecidingId(applicationId);\n   239→    setError(\"\");\n   240→    try {\n   241→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/applications`, {\n   242→        method: \"PATCH\",\n   243→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   244→        body: JSON.stringify({ applicationId, action }),\n   245→      });\n   246→      const data = await res.json();\n   247→      if (!res.ok) {\n   248→        setError(data.error);\n   249→        return;\n   250→      }\n   251→      await fetchListing();\n   252→    } catch {\n   253→      setError(\"Failed to process application. Please try again.\");\n   254→    } finally {\n   255→      setDecidingId(null);\n   256→    }\n   257→  };\n   258→\n   259→  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n   260→    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n   261→  };\n   262→\n   263→  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n   264→    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n   265→    : \"\";\n   266→\n   267→  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n   268→    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n   269→    setTelegramSaving(true);"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"f91e1dcc-1770-4ba2-aa67-b4b421811a43","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:34.883Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01A9Z7mgh1XXnC4GNxswZmdJ","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→const AVAILABLE_GENRES = [\n     6→  \"Literary Fiction\",\n     7→  \"Science Fiction\",\n     8→  \"Fantasy\",\n     9→  \"Mystery\",\n    10→  \"Thriller\",\n    11→  \"Romance\",\n    12→  \"Historical Fiction\",\n    13→  \"Horror\",\n    14→  \"Dystopian\",\n    15→  \"Adventure\",\n    16→  \"Contemporary Fiction\",\n    17→  \"Magical Realism\",\n    18→  \"Classics\",\n    19→  \"Short Stories\",\n    20→  \"Young Adult\",\n    21→  \"Graphic Novels\",\n    22→];\n    23→\n    24→interface GenreRow {\n    25→  genre: string;\n    26→}\n    27→\n    28→export async function GET() {\n    29→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    30→  if (!session) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  const userGenres = db.prepare(\n    35→    \"SELECT genre FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY genre\"\n    36→  ).all(session.userId) as GenreRow[];\n    37→\n    38→  return NextResponse.json({\n    39→    genres: userGenres.map((g) => g.genre),\n    40→    available: AVAILABLE_GENRES,\n    41→  });\n    42→}\n    43→\n    44→export async function PUT(req: NextRequest) {\n    45→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    46→  if (!session) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  const { genres } = await req.json();\n    51→\n    52→  if (!Array.isArray(genres)) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"genres must be an array\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Validate all genres\n    57→  const validGenres = genres.filter((g: string) => AVAILABLE_GENRES.includes(g));\n    58→\n    59→  // Replace all genres in a transaction\n    60→  const updateGenres = db.transaction(() => {\n    61→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ?\").run(session.userId);\n    62→    const insert = db.prepare(\"INSERT INTO user_genres (user_id, genre) VALUES (?, ?)\");\n    63→    for (const genre of validGenres) {\n    64→      insert.run(session.userId, genre);\n    65→    }\n    66→  });\n    67→\n    68→  updateGenres();\n    69→\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({ genres: validGenres });\n    71→}\n    72→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"4862515c-d602-477c-b357-15ac093d0a40","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:35.514Z"}

Please try again.\");\n   352→    } finally {\n   353→      setAutoDiscordLoading(false);\n   354→    }\n   355→  };\n   356→\n   357→  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n   358→    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n   359→      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n   360→      text: \"Text chat\",\n   361→      mixed: \"Mixed (voice + text)\",\n   362→    };\n   363→    return labels[f] || f;\n   364→  };\n   365→\n   366→  if (loading) {\n   367→    return (\n   368→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n   369→        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n   370→      </div>\n   371→    );\n   372→  }\n   373→\n   374→  if (fetchError) {\n   375→    return (\n   376→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   377→        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Something went wrong</h2>\n   378→        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n   379→          Failed to load this listing. Please try again.\n   380→        </p>\n   381→        <button\n   382→          onClick={() => { setFetchError(false); setLoading(true); fetchListing(); }}\n   383→          className=\"mt-4 px-4 {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01W5Ns6z1oh9iqA4WuWCadE5","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Simple in-memory rate limiter for auth endpoints.\n     3→ * Uses a sliding window approach keyed by identifier (IP + route).\n     4→ * Not shared across cluster workers — acceptable for SQLite single-process setup.\n     5→ */\n     6→\n     7→interface RateLimitEntry {\n     8→  timestamps: number[];\n     9→}\n    10→\n    11→const store = new Map<string, RateLimitEntry>();\n    12→\n    13→// Clean up expired entries every 5 minutes\n    14→const CLEANUP_INTERVAL = 5 * 60 * 1000;\n    15→setInterval(() => {\n    16→  const now = Date.now();\n    17→  for (const [key, entry] of store) {\n    18→    entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < 15 * 60 * 1000);\n    19→    if (entry.timestamps.length === 0) {\n    20→      store.delete(key);\n    21→    }\n    22→  }\n    23→}, CLEANUP_INTERVAL);\n    24→\n    25→/**\n    26→ * Check if a request should be rate limited.\n    27→ * @param key - Unique identifier (e.g., IP + email for login, IP for register)\n    28→ * @param maxAttempts - Maximum attempts allowed in the window\n    29→ * @param windowMs - Time window in milliseconds (default: 15 minutes)\n    30→ * @returns Object with allowed boolean and retryAfter seconds (0 if allowed)\n    31→ */\n    32→export function checkRateLimit(\n    33→  key: string,\n    34→  maxAttempts: number = 5,\n    35→  windowMs: number = 15 * 60 * 1000\n    36→): { allowed: boolean; retryAfter: number } {\n    37→  const now = Date.now();\n    38→  let entry = store.get(key);\n    39→\n    40→  if (!entry) {\n    41→    entry = { timestamps: [] };\n    42→    store.set(key, entry);\n    43→  }\n    44→\n    45→  // Remove expired timestamps\n    46→  entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < windowMs);\n    47→\n    48→  if (entry.timestamps.length >= maxAttempts) {\n    49→    const oldestInWindow = entry.timestamps[0];\n    50→    const retryAfter = Math.ceil((oldestInWindow + windowMs - now) / 1000);\n    51→    return { allowed: false, retryAfter };\n    52→  }\n    53→\n    54→  entry.timestamps.push(now);\n    55→  return { allowed: true, retryAfter: 0 };\n    56→}\n    57→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"96f4ea2f-3a29-4bd0-8796-1e4d4f224269","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:42.879Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01AYjQm9s2umFqX9hTyW5448","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";\n     2→\n     3→const isConfigured =\n     4→  !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&\n     5→  !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&\n     6→  !!process.env.SMTP_FROM;\n     7→\n     8→let transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;\n     9→\n    10→function getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {\n    11→  if (!isConfigured) return null;\n    12→  if (!transporter) {\n    13→    transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({\n    14→      host: process.env.SMTP_HOST,\n    15→      port: parseInt(process.env.SMTP_PORT || \"587\", 10),\n    16→      secure: process.env.SMTP_SECURE === \"true\",\n    17→      ...(process.env.SMTP_USER && process.env.SMTP_PASS\n    18→        ? {\n    19→            auth: {\n    20→              user: process.env.SMTP_USER,\n    21→              pass: process.env.SMTP_PASS,\n    22→            },\n    23→          }\n    24→        : {}),\n    25→    });\n    26→  }\n    27→  return transporter;\n    28→}\n    29→\n    30→export async function sendEmail(\n    31→  to: string,\n    32→  subject: string,\n    33→  text: string,\n    34→  html?: string\n    35→): Promise<boolean> {\n    36→  const t = getTransporter();\n    37→  if (!t) return false;\n    38→\n    39→  try {\n    40→    await t.sendMail({\n    41→      from: process.env.SMTP_FROM,\n    42→      to,\n    43→      subject,\n    44→      text,\n    45→      html: html || text,\n    46→    });\n    47→    return true;\n    48→  } catch (err) {\n    49→    console.error(\"Failed to send email:\", err);\n    50→    return false;\n    51→  }\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→export function isEmailConfigured(): boolean {\n    55→  return isConfigured;\n    56→}\n    57→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"78ff9508-1b09-4358-b12d-d4e11cdf4b95","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:43.315Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01YFm8D5nkuVFZvorqZh27Uh","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    17→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const listing = db\n    21→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    22→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json(\n    30→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n    31→      { status: 403 }\n    32→    );\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  const { telegramLink } = await req.json();\n    36→\n    37→  if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\") || telegramLink.length > 512) {\n    38→    return NextResponse.json(\n    39→      { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/..., max 512 characters)\" },\n    40→      { status: 400 }\n    41→    );\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    45→    telegramLink.trim(),\n    46→    listingId\n    47→  );\n    48→\n    49→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    50→}\n    51→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"3b3f5358-c649-4bd3-99d2-b30387037d8b","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:43.665Z"}

  2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    17→    return NextResponse.json({ error: Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json(\n    30→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Discord link\" },\n    31→      { status: 403 }\n    32→    );\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  const { discordLink } = await req.json();\n    36→\n    37→  if (\n    38→    !discordLink ||\n    39→    discordLink.length > 512 ||\n    40→    !(\n    41→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.gg/\") ||\n    42→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.com/invite/\")\n    43→    )\n    44→  ) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      {\n    47→        error:\n    48→          \"Please provide a valid Discord invite link (https://discord.gg/... or https://discord.com/invite/..., max 512 characters)\",\n    49→      },\n    50→      { status: 400 }\n    51→    );\n    52→  }\n    53→\n    54→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    55→    discordLink.trim(),\n    56→    listingId\n    57→  );\n    58→\n    59→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    60→}\n    61→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"8e81923a-fd4c-4a51-9aa0-deb5493f9265","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:46.591Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01VzbAH8rZ8vVeRGXfUzo2eN","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→interface ReadingRow {\n     6→  id: number;\n     7→  book_title: string;\n     8→  book_author: string;\n     9→  book_cover_url: string;\n    10→  reading_pace: string;\n    11→  start_date: string;\n    12→  meeting_format: string;\n    13→  is_full: number;\n    14→  telegram_link: string;\n    15→  member_count: number;\n    16→  max_group_size: number;\n    17→  author_name: string;\n    18→  joined_at: string;\n    19→}\n    20→\n    21→export async function GET() {\n    22→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    23→  if (!session) {\n    24→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    25→  }\n    26→\n    27→  // Get all listings the user is a member of (including ones they authored)\n    28→  const readings = db.prepare(`\n    29→    SELECT\n    30→      l.id,\n    31→      l.book_title,\n    32→      l.book_author,\n    33→      l.book_cover_url,\n    34→      l.reading_pace,\n    35→      l.start_date,\n    36→      l.meeting_format,\n    37→      l.is_full,\n    38→      l.telegram_link,\n    39→      l.max_group_size,\n    40→      u.display_name as author_name,\n    41→      lm.joined_at,\n    42→      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    43→    FROM listing_members lm\n    44→    JOIN listings l ON l.id = lm.listing_id\n    45→    JOIN users u ON u.id = l.author_id\n    46→    WHERE lm.user_id = ?\n    47→    ORDER BY lm.joined_at DESC\n    48→  `).all(session.userId) as ReadingRow[];\n    49→\n    50→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    51→\n    52→  // Reading history: completed groups (full + start_date in the past)\n    53→  // Upcoming: not yet started and not full\n    54→  // Active: everything else that has started or is full (but not completed)\n    55→  const isHistory = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 1 && r.start_date < today;\n    56→  const isUpcoming = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 0 && r.start_date > today;\n    57→\n    58→  const history = readings.filter(isHistory);\n    59→  const upcoming = readings.filter(isUpcoming);\n    60→  const active = readings.filter(\n    61→    (r) => !isHistory(r) && !isUpcoming(r) && (r.is_full === 1 || r.start_date <= today)\n    62→  );\n    63→\n    64→  return NextResponse.json({\n    65→    active,\n    66→    history,\n    67→    upcoming,\n    68→    total: readings.length,\n    69→  });\n    70→}\n    71→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01SJFzWJw4Xd2BwmRVQgk6HC","session_id":"661d5038-d930-4e21-8f3a-b6e8597abfb8","uuid":"479d7297-556c-4085-92ca-f61c0320c562","timestamp":"2026-03-23T20:01:46.831Z"}
